---
title: "hw 3"
author: "Stella Symonds"
format: pdf
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
---

# Part 1: Set up 

```{r}
#| label: set-up

# reading in packages 
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(readxl)

# reading in data
# kelp data
kelp <- read.csv(
  here("data", "temp-kelp.csv"))
# personal data 
bike_rides <- read_xlsx(
  here("data", "bike-rides.xlsx"))
```

# Part 2: Problems 

## Problem 1 

a.
